pi_items.source: WebFetch from https://crawler-test.com/ confirmed real, functioning website with redirect test suite
Domain extracted from verified target_url; WebFetch confirmed domain accessibility
WebFetch from https://crawler-test.com/ documented redirect test paths including /redirects/redirect_1 (301) and /redirects/redirect_3_302 (302)
Task specification confirmed in setup_task.sh and README.md which create this directory structure

WebFetch from https://crawler-test.com/ documented 28 distinct redirect test paths including Redirect 301, Redirect Double 301, Redirect 302, Redirect 307, and others. A crawl would find well above the minimum of 3 redirects.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets https://crawler-test.com/, a real, publicly accessible website specifically designed for testing SEO crawlers and redirect handling. The site contains 28+ documented redirect test paths including 301 and 302 status codes across multiple redirect scenarios (single redirects, chains, meta redirects, header refreshes, etc.). A successful Screaming Frog crawl would easily identify well above the minimum of 3 redirecting URLs with 3xx status codes from the crawler-test.com domain.
